SELECT exp10(value) FROM test_exp10 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT exp10(SUBQUERY.power) FROM (SELECT value AS power FROM test_exp10 WHERE value > 0) AS SUBQUERY;
SELECT exp10(t1.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_exp10 UNION ALL SELECT 10) AS t1;
CREATE TABLE test_exp10_nested (id UInt32, nested_value Float64);
SELECT nested_value, exp10(nested_value) FROM test_exp10_nested WHERE nested_value IN (SELECT nested_value FROM test_exp10_nested WHERE nested_value < 5);
SELECT exp10(t1.value + t2.value) FROM test_exp10 t1 JOIN test_exp10 t2 ON t1.value > t2.value;
